overall.description: A first-person walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade at sunset in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily forward past vehicles on an adjacent road, passing under a large overpass bridge with a distinctive '02' tower visible, while the orange-hued sky reflects off the water and distant amusement park structures become visible.

events.description: approaching and entering the shadow of the overpass bridge, ambient light begins to drop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward the overpass bridge

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink clothing walking ahead, then moving to the left and exiting the frame

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with metal railings spanning across the path ahead
tall cylindrical building with illuminated white '02' signage near the top
metal safety railing running along the edge of the waterfront promenade
paved road with vehicles passing by, separated from the walkway by bollards
calm body of water reflecting the orange sunset sky
silhouetted amusement park roller coaster structure visible on the distant shore

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open waterfront promenade at sunset, approaching a massive concrete overpass. A person in pink clothing moves aside as the camera advances. Vehicles pass on the adjacent road to the right, while a distinctive tower marked '02' looms ahead against the orange-pink sky. The roller coaster silhouette is visible in the far distance across the water.

events.description: moving fully into the shadow of the overpass, ambient light drops significantly creating a darker atmosphere
slight rightward turn of camera to view the '02' tower as it is passed

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, glancing toward the '02' tower on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic black van with illuminated elements driving past on the adjacent road

entered.detail: concrete retaining wall covered in graffiti and street art under the overpass
modern angled street lamp post with red lighting elements
futuristic city buildings with illuminated signs becoming visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Now walking under the massive concrete overpass, the lighting shifts to shadow with a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. The '02' tower dominates the right side as we pass by it. A futuristic van drives past on the right. Graffiti-covered walls line the path, and the distant city skyline with a prominent roller coaster becomes more visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway under overpass with city views

events.description: '02' tower passes out of view behind, revealing expanded view of the distant city skyline and amusement park

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered promenade with the roller coaster and city skyline now prominent on the left

entered.detail: palm trees lining the waterfront edge, becoming visible as the path continues

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the '02' tower and graffiti wall are now behind us. The view opens up to reveal a sprawling futuristic city skyline and a prominent roller coaster structure across the water. Palm trees line the waterfront ahead, and the walkway remains covered but feels more open with the orange sunset visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from an open sunset vista into a shadowed underpass before emerging toward a sprawling city skyline. It begins in the warm glow of an orange-pink sky, passing a pedestrian in pink clothing while vehicles stream along an adjacent road toward a looming tower marked 02. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into the deep shadows of a massive concrete overpass, where graffiti-covered walls line the path and a futuristic van drives past. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the tower and the overpass behind, revealing a wide view of the water. Finally, the walkway leads toward a line of palm trees and a distant skyline dominated by the silhouette of a prominent roller coaster under the fading sunset.
